name: list_directory
description: Lists directory contents. **Protocol:** Use to verify the existence of a path before assuming its structure. **Epistemic Mandate:** Confirm physical presence of files before planning operations.

dir_path.description: The path to the directory to list

pattern.description: Optional: Glob pattern to filter files (e.g., '**/*.js').

name: read_file
description: Reads file content. **Protocol:** ALWAYS read the context (exact lines) before using the 'replace' tool in the same turn or turn prior. **Epistemic Mandate:** Ensure your mental model matches the literal state of the file.

file_path.description: The path to the file to read.

start_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to start reading from.

end_line.description: Optional: The 1-based line number to end reading at (inclusive).

name: grep_search
description: Searches for patterns. **Protocol:** Be aware of binary files; use 'include_pattern' to avoid garbage output. **Epistemic Mandate:** Identify systemic dependencies and verify global consistency.

name: replace
description: Replaces text. **Protocol:** 'old_string' MUST be an exact, literal match including all whitespace/indentation as confirmed by a prior 'read_file'. **Epistemic Mandate:** Surgical accuracy prevents regression. Ockham's Razor applies.

file_path.description: The path to the file to modify.

old_string.description: The exact literal text to replace. MUST match existing file state exactly.

new_string.description: The exact literal text to replace 'old_string' with.

name: run_shell_command
description: Executes shell commands. **Protocol:** 1. PROBE environment first (ldd, import, which). 2. Use NON-INTERACTIVE flags (-n, --silent, --no-pager). 3. Reproduce the bug first. **Epistemic Mandate:** Empirical verification is the only path to truth.

name: write_file
description: Writes complete content. **Protocol:** Verify the parent directory exists using 'list_directory' first. **Epistemic Mandate:** Use for small, discrete components. Audit for complexity before creation.

file_path.description: The path to the file to write to.

name: codebase_investigator
description: Systemic analysis. **Protocol:** Map cross-file dependencies to prevent 'Sunk Cost' fixes in isolated files. **Epistemic Mandate:** Topological awareness prevents global regressions.

name: ask_user
description: Asks questions. **Protocol:** Use when a 'sudo' prompt is inevitable or when a plan's complexity requires manual approval. **Epistemic Mandate:** Resolve uncertainty that blocks empirical progress.
